mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.nickname, u.gender, u.age, u.phone, u.email, u.height_cm AS heightCm, u.weight_kg AS weightKg, u.bmi, u.fitness_goal AS fitnessGoal, u.activity_level AS activityLevel, u.diet_preference AS dietPreference, u.role_id AS roleId, r.role_code AS roleCode, r.role_name AS roleName, u.status, u.created_at AS createdAt, u.updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password_hash, real_name, nickname, phone, email, role_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{roleId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, height_cm = #{heightCm}, weight_kg = #{weightKg}, bmi = #{bmi}, fitness_goal = #{fitnessGoal}, activity_level = #{activityLevel}, diet_preference = #{dietPreference}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.id
